description: An environmental officer needs to check the port's air quality monitoring system for compliance with regulations.

nodes.task_description: Access the dashboard for the port's real-time air quality monitoring sensors.

expected_outcome.expected: Officer logs into the environmental monitoring system.

nodes.task_description: Review the current levels of pollutants like NOx, SOx, and particulate matter.

expected_outcome.expected: The officer reviews the data from all sensors.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all readings are within the permitted regulatory limits and log the check.

expected_outcome.expected: Officer confirms all levels are compliant and creates a log entry for the daily check.
